ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Continued To Oct-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Moye appeared by telephone for Clare Whitlam.

The Court stated that it is waiting for the final inventory and appraisal. Mr. Moye stated that the Decedent had stock in a start-up company, that the company is going through various financings and will be issuing options, and that he hopes to have the final inventory done by February of 2021. The Court informed Mr. Moye that he has to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Moye stated that he filed a report, but the Clerk rejected it. The Court informed Mr. Moye as to how the document should be titled, that he must not include a hearing date and that a hearing date will be assigned by the Clerk when the document gets presented for filing. Status on close of estate is continued to October 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
